name: leadership-in-turbulent-times
description: Doris Kearns Goodwin's Leadership: In Turbulent Times — presidential leadership toolkit examining how Lincoln, TR, FDR, and LBJ developed ambition, overcame adversity, and led through America's greatest crises
useCase: Understand the development of presidential leadership, learn from four types of crisis leadership, and apply lessons of resilience and purpose to your own journey
knownRisks: The book focuses exclusively on US presidents — leadership models from other cultures and contexts are not covered
Goodwin has been criticized for being too sympathetic to LBJ, particularly on Vietnam
Lessons from 19th and 20th century presidents may not translate directly to 21st century challenges
